ton will come into existence on the

nv 20 miles long extending from

The new division will not necessi-
tate any noticeable changes in the
train service. excepting on No. and
Q. both these making more stops
than formerly In the past II has
been noticed that Nos. and were
not hauling the number of passeng9rs
they should, while Nos. 3 and were
always loaded down. many having
to stand up part OF the time.


This state of affairs has been caus-
ed by the fact that Nos. / and make
long runs and the order to have them
make more stops Is no surprise,
